starry_unigraph package

class starry_unigraph.SchedulerSession(session_ctx: SessionContext, provider: Any, model_spec: Any, task_adapter: Any)[source]

Bases: object

build_runtime() → RuntimeBundle[source]
evaluate(split: str = 'test') → dict[str, Any][source]
classmethod from_config(config_or_path: str | Path | dict[str, Any], dataset_path: str | Path | None = None, overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None) → SchedulerSession[source]
load_checkpoint(path: str | Path) → dict[str, Any][source]
predict(split: str = 'test') → PredictionResult[source]
prepare_data() → PreparedArtifacts[source]
run_epoch(split: str = 'train') → dict[str, Any][source]
run_task() → dict[str, Any][source]
save_checkpoint(path: str | Path) → Path[source]
